validation.summary: Full release smoke passed on win32 with 18 recorded real CLI steps and temporary workspace cleanup.
No port 8888 listener and no matching demo smoke process remained.

controllerChecks: Release smoke evidence is recorded in implementation-review/ledger.json.
The smoke exercised the real CLI path through isolated LAUNCHDECK_HOME and a temporary copy of the official demo.

Leader repair aligned quickstart duplicate-start wording with current existing-run semantics.
The accepted smoke is Windows-local only and does not claim macOS/Linux readiness.
Cleanup stop exit 1 was accepted because the full smoke had already stopped and removed the isolated target and the residual scan was clean.
acceptedResidualRisks: macOS and Linux smoke evidence remain required before any cross-platform-ready claim.
